description: Composition Brown dress made of blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline, is sleeveless and has a chest placket, has pleats on the front and comes with a slim belt that has bronze hardware Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean preferred Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Flat dry Cool iron on reverse This brown dress from femella is styled to become your new day-to-night staple. This versatile piece can be worn with opaque tights and block heels – try substituting the slim belt with a broad one. You can also wear this with a structured jacket, the slim belt, a box clutch and heels for a dressier occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
